threads.title: Welcome to Nalanda — free knowledge community
threads.body: Learn, teach, and discuss here. Knowledge is free — invite friends with your personal link below. Share lessons from Nalanda SkillFlow AI or ITelearn, or post your own.

replies.body: Excited to share what I learn from the QA→AI path with the community.
